prompt: On the left, list ‘Spending 12 hours debugging’, and on the right, list ‘Getting a single semicolon wrong’. Add an emoji next to each.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. On the left side of image 1, add the text 'Spending 12 hours debugging' below the phrase 'i receive:'. On the right side of image 1, add the text 'Getting a single semicolon wrong' below the phrase 'you receive:'. Include an emoji next to each of these two newly added text phrases.
objects: text "Spending 12 hours debugging" on the left, below "i receive:"
text "Getting a single semicolon wrong" on the right, below "you receive:"
emoji next to "Getting a single semicolon wrong"
